text:
Ugh... Leofric was missing today.  We went to find him... he was pretty upset.  There was news from Cheliax.  Thrune declared war... but some of the Hellknights refused to join her.

We argued about... maybe WORKING with Hellknights?   How could we do that?  But, maybe some of them aren't so bad... ugh, {d:Sang'et damnis!:blood and damnation}, they can't be trusted!  I just.. I don't know.  {d:Rogus et cinera.:Pyre and ash}...

Leofric, meanwhile.... ugh, {d:Cal'acutus.:smartass}, he says I better start reading or else I'm just doing what the Order of the Rack does.  Whatever, {d:In ignem eum.:burn him}.

Malgrin came later.  We talked about undead.
Figure out how to use wands!
